Dialog.name: MSG_000_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}It's... starting to settle down, I think...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}...Thank you for coming. It's comforting to have someone with me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Why do I have to face this alone? Why am I the one...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}I can't run around like I did as a child anymore, because my legs and heart won't even let me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}...All that's left is to draw my sheets around me and count the beats of my heart until they stop forever.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_9_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}...Why is this only happening to me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}It really is... What a twisted sense of humor he has![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}There's no reasoning behind it! None at all![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}...That's the worst part. If only there was some meaning to my death... But there isn't...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 5 13 20 5 117}Hmph... Of course not. No one could. I don't even know.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I mean, I understand the reason I'm dying, but what even is the meaning of it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}There isn't any meaning to life that I can find, so perhaps I'm not missing all that much.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Sure, there are plenty of people dying in this world.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}But, so what? What does that have to do with my death?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Where is there meaning in any of this!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}But if my body were capable of that, I wouldn't be here anyway...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 117 0 25 25}No matter what I do, my body is there to remind me... I'm going to die.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}But, I'd still like to talk... for just a little longer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}I'm feeling... a little better now... Thank you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My presence is comforting to Kamiki...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like our relationship is stronger...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}{f 4 23 0 117 1 25 25}Don't worry, I'll be fine now... I hope I can see you again soon.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted ways with Kamiki,[n]then headed back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
